title: Instrucciones
description: Euforia Instructions is a high-performance cinematic utility designed for Minecraft servers to display professional HUD overlays to all players. It allows administrators to broadcast real-time instructions, rules, and custom titles with smooth fade-in/out
body:
# 📺 Eufonia Instructions (fan)
### *The Cinematic Event Framework for Minecraft Servers*

**Euforia Instructions** is a high-performance administrative tool designed to deliver professional, synchronized visual overlays to all players. Whether you are hosting a massive tournament, a roleplay event, or a community challenge, this mod allows you to broadcast rules, phase transitions, and real-time instructions with a premium cinematic feel.

---

## ✨ Core Features

* 🌐 **Global Synchronization**: Every update, timer change, or text edit is instantly synced across the entire server to all connected clients.
* 🎭 **Cinematic Immersion**: Features a smooth 2.5-second fade-in/out system and built-in camera shader support to transform the atmosphere of your event.
* ⏱️ **Integrated Event Timer**: A centralized, high-visibility countdown clock to keep every player informed of event phases or objective deadlines.
* 🎨 **Dynamic Styling & Branding**: Real-time control over colors (Hex & 80+ presets), text scales, and element positioning. Supports custom logos in screen corners.
* 📁 **Config Presets**: Save and load different HUD layouts as `.json` files to swap between complex event phases instantly.

---

## ⌨️ Command Reference (`/luxep`)

Master your event with the complete command suite. (Requires OP Level 4)

### 📂 1. Scene & Display Control
| Command | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| `/luxep escena mostrar [hh:mm:ss]` | Opens the HUD globally (use `0` for permanent display) |
| `/luxep escena mostrar_a <players>` | Shows the HUD only to specific users or groups |
| `/luxep escena ocultar` | Closes the HUD for everyone instantly |
| `/luxep escena bloquear_hud <true\|false>` | Toggles the F1 key blocking for maximum focus |

### 🎨 2. Visual Customization
| Command | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| `/luxep ui texto <principal\|secundario> <text>` | Updates main titles (use `;` for line breaks) |
| `/luxep ui color fondo <color1> [color2]` | Sets solid or gradient backgrounds (Hex or Names) |
| `/luxep ui color <element> <color>` | Changes color for titles, clock, lines, or instructions |
| `/luxep ui escala <element> <value>` | Adjusts sizes for text and logos (e.g., `1.5`) |
| `/luxep ui offset <element> <x> <y>` | Precise X/Y positioning for logos and titles |

### ⚙️ 3. Content & File Management
| Command | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| `/luxep controles <add\|mod\|del\|clear>` | Manage the specific action/keybind list on screen |
| `/luxep logos <primary\|secondary> <path>` | Load custom corner images from the mod folder |
| `/luxep archivo <save\|load\|list>` | Manage your professional `.json` configurations |

---
*Developed by Sofyx*
